item.title: Bitcoin falls to nearly $64,000 as 2026 crypto woes continue
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $65,000 on Monday as geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainty sparked another flight from risk-on investments.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Arcellx, Novo Nordisk, Domino's Pizza and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in premarket trading.

item.title: Here are 3 forces that drove the stock market during Wall Street’s comeback week
item.description: The stock market staged a comeback, even as Wall Street waded through a flurry of both upbeat and unsettling headlines.

item.title: Market volatility trap? Why this income-first strategy may 'leave a lot on the table'
item.description: The market volatility may be leading retail investors astray.

item.title: Illiquid loans, investor demands: Blue Owl's software lending triggers another quake in private credit
item.description: Blue Owl, a direct lender specializing in loans to the software industry, said it had sold $1.4 billion of its loans to institutional investors at 99....
